name_en: Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 22cm
name_cn:
Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 22cm
The most elegant accordion bag series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite grainy cowhide with a rich luster, very luxurious! The strap is adjustable, choose the length you prefer! The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the understated luxury style~
Model: 717440
Size: 22x18x10.5cm
